comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://yandex.ru/pogoda/ru/romashki?lat=60.718229&lon=29.806218](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyandex.ru%2Fpogoda%2Fru%2Fromashki%3Flat%3D60.718229%26lon%3D29.806218) ### Comment > Не блокирует рекламу Яндекс.Да и как данное расширение будет блокировать рекламу от Яндекса?Если Яндекс находится в исключениях. ``` Username: @Игорь ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.net/sitereports/bpagahat1m8ss0w80gggws8s8sgk4wsae400xyem88.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.2.400.0 MV2 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Opera Tracking protection: | **General settings**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base

Annoyances:

AdGuard Cookie Notices,
AdGuard Popups,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners,
AdGuard Other Annoyances,
AdGuard Widgets,
EasyList Cookie List

Language-specific:
AdGuard Russian Filters last update: | November 30, 2025 at 07:47 Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Other extensions used: | `AdBlocker Ultimate` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.2.400.0&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=2&browser=opera&filters=2.1.14.18.19.20.21.22.241&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&filters_last_update=2025-11-30T07%3A47%3A59)
